# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: ci-cd-builder
    team: platform
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder-sa
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    runAsGroup: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
    - name: builder
      image: gcr.io/our-registry/buildkit-builder:1.4.0@sha256:abc123def456
      command: ["buildctl-daemonless.sh"]
      args: ["build", "--frontend", "dockerfile.v0"]
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
        privileged: false
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "512Mi"
          ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2000m"
          memory: "2Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_CONFIG
          value: /home/builder/.docker
        - name: BUILDKITD_FLAGS
          value: "--oci-worker-no-process-sandbox"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: build-cache
          mountPath: /home/builder/.cache
        - name: docker-config
          mountPath: /home/builder/.docker
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp-dir
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: build-workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - "pgrep buildkitd || exit 1"
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 30
      imagePullPolicy: Always
  volumes:
    - name: build-cache
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 5Gi
    - name: docker-config
      secret:
        secretName: registry-credentials
        defaultMode: 0400
        items:
          - key: config.json
            path: config.json
    - name: tmp-dir
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: 256Mi
    - name: build-workspace
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 2Gi
  restartPolicy: Never
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 1800
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "build"
      effect: "NoSchedule"
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  hostIPC: false
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-sa
  namespace: build
  annotations:
    description: "Minimal service account for CI/CD builder pods"
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-netpol
  namespace: build
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ci-cd-builder
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              k8s-app: kube-dns
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
